one_time_description: Flood claim settlement of $88.4 million paid to Naotkamegwanning Community Trust; $25.4 million utilized for legal fees and per capita distributions during the year
economic_notes: Impact Benefit Agreement with New Gold Inc. for Rainy River Project: minimum $125,000/year metal production payments, minimum $125,000/year royalty payments based on share price, and $50,000 annual education payment. Paagitoon Limited Partnership (janitorial services, 99.9% owned) did not operate in 2024. Mining revenue of $206,626 received.
notes: Prior year (2023) audit was modified opinion by a different auditor. Large flood claim settlement of $88.4M paid to community trust; only $25.4M flowed through operations in 2023 as per capita distributions and legal fees - this distorts year-over-year comparisons significantly. CMHC capital funding of $8,773,527 received in 2024 drove large deferred revenue increase to $26.3M. Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Naotkamegwanning Education Authority, Naotkamegwanning Health and Social Services, Shawendaasowin Child and Family Services. One GBE: Paagitoon Limited Partnership (janitorial, 99.9% owned, inactive in 2024). Housing units estimated at 60 based on CMHC mortgage loans (9+12+10+10+7+8+4 units). No schedule of remuneration provided. Annual debt service calculated as net change in long term debt repayments per cash flow statement ($582,345 net).
